---
title: "Early News"
page-layout: full
---
## Conference Presentations

::: {.bhs-header}
![](images/BHS_logo.png){.bhs-logo fig-alt="British Hip Society (BHS) logo"}

### British Hip Society (BHS) — Olympia 2026
:::

1. Title: <a href="files/BHS_Abstract.docx" download="BHS_Abstract.docx"><em>Ranking implant loading during high-impact exercises in people with total hip replacements</em></a>  
   **Poster:** <a href="images/BHS_Abstract.png" class="lightbox"><img src="images/BHS_Abstract.png" class="poster-thumb" alt="BHS poster thumbnail"></a>

2. Title: <a href="files/BHS_Abstract.docx" download="BHS_Abstract.docx"><em>Ranking implant loading during high-impact exercises in people with total hip replacements</em></a>


## Pre-print Articles

* **Coming soon...**





{{< include _disclaimer.qmd >}}
